tools.name: applyYaraRules.postOperation
tools.description: apply given YARA rules to the given executable. (upto 10 rules)

tools.name: emulationOutput.postOperation
tools.description: try to get the emulation output after unpacking the file

tools.description: generate partial YARA rules for give executable. (Rule without the condition section)

tools.name: unpack.postOperation
tools.description: try to unpack the given file

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
